reason_for_priority: Most direct transcript-supported setup and cleanest first signal to implement.
required_data: OHLCV; volumetric footprint volume at price; swing/session levels
easiest_first_test: Bar close at swing/session edge with edge volume <= 10; next bar trades 1 tick in reversal direction.
stricter_test: Test swing lookback grid 10/20/25/50 and edge volume grid 5/10/15/20 plus percentile alternative.
soft_score_version: Score edge volume rarity, level quality, bar range, stop distance, next-bar response.
expected_failure_mode: Too many signals if mid-range exhaustion is allowed; thresholds may be market-specific.
notes: Build first. This proves whether the core exhaustion print has standalone value.

reason_for_priority: Directly supported management rule and cheap to test on every signal.
required_data: OHLCV; entry state; time
easiest_first_test: For VH001 signals, exit/downgrade if MFE is below threshold after 5 bars or 10 minutes.
stricter_test: Test 3/5/10 bars and 5/10 minutes; compare scratch, hard exit, and score downgrade.
soft_score_version: Grade time-to-response and early MFE instead of fixed timeout only.
expected_failure_mode: May cut delayed winners; timeout varies by bar type and session.
notes: Use as management overlay, not entry trigger.

reason_for_priority: Flagship A+ idea: exhaustion after absorbed aggression at an edge.
required_data: OHLCV; footprint; delta; bid/ask volume; levels
easiest_first_test: Require VH001 plus prior absorption proxy within prior N bars: delta contradiction or effort/result failure.
stricter_test: Require absorption score, edge exhaustion, level score, and next-bar trigger; test A+ cutoffs 75/82/90.
soft_score_version: Composite of absorption score, exhaustion score, level score, confirmation, stop quality.
expected_failure_mode: Absorption proxy may be noisy without DOM; can overfit if too many conditions are required.
notes: Best second test after VH001 baseline.

reason_for_priority: Strong evidence but requires approximation; useful independent of exhaustion.
required_data: OHLCV; delta; bid/ask volume; footprint; levels
easiest_first_test: At support/resistance, high delta effort with poor price progress and close rejection.
stricter_test: Add repeated defended price, POC/close-location, and retest confirmation.
soft_score_version: Score effort/result, delta contradiction, level quality, repeated defense.
expected_failure_mode: Calling ordinary high volume absorption; passive side is inferred historically.
notes: Do not make binary. Use as score module.

reason_for_priority: High-priority bearish pattern: strong positive delta at highs can be bearish if no continuation.
required_data: OHLCV; delta; footprint; HOD/resistance levels
easiest_first_test: At HOD/swing high/resistance, positive delta percentile >= 80 and no upside continuation; short on rejection.
stricter_test: Require close below mid/bar low break, absorption score, or failed acceptance below level.
soft_score_version: Score positive delta percentile, poor continuation, level quality, rejection strength.
expected_failure_mode: Will fail badly in real upside continuation or trend-day breakout.
notes: Backtest separately for HOD/resistance only before generalizing.

reason_for_priority: Bullish mirror to VH004; strong selling at lows only matters when absorbed.
required_data: OHLCV; delta; footprint; LOD/support levels
easiest_first_test: At LOD/swing low/support, extreme negative delta with green/off-low close or next-bar lift.
stricter_test: Require absorption score, reclaimed low, and no fresh sell initiative after signal.
soft_score_version: Score negative delta percentile, close location, level quality, upward response.
expected_failure_mode: Can catch falling knives in liquidation/trend days.
notes: Useful pair with VH004 for symmetric tests.

reason_for_priority: Matches discretionary confluence better than single-feature triggers.
required_data: All module features used by enabled tests
easiest_first_test: Combine VH001, VH002/VH003, VH004/VH005, confirmation, risk, and timing into score >= 82.
stricter_test: Add hard gates: meaningful level, footprint data, stop max, no trend acceptance against signal.
soft_score_version: Separate bullish and bearish location/failure/confirmation/risk/timing scores.
expected_failure_mode: Can hide weak sub-rules behind weighted score; needs component logging.
notes: Implement after first modules exist; do not start here.

reason_for_priority: Highly practical, simple to backtest, less footprint-dependent.
required_data: OHLCV; levels; delta optional; footprint optional
easiest_first_test: Break prior high/low/session/value level and close back inside within 1-3 bars.
stricter_test: Require delta/volume trap, rejection close, and next-bar hold away from level.
soft_score_version: Score level type, break distance, reclaim speed, follow-through after reclaim.
expected_failure_mode: Confuses noise wicks with true failed break unless level quality is strong.
notes: Good early module because it works even when footprint data is incomplete.

reason_for_priority: Good confluence feature; not safe as standalone.
required_data: OHLCV; bar delta; cumulative delta; levels
easiest_first_test: Retest/new extreme with weaker delta than prior same-direction push; require rejection.
stricter_test: Add exhaustion/absorption confluence and reject signals in chop/mid-range.
soft_score_version: Score divergence magnitude, level quality, confirmation, confluence.
expected_failure_mode: Many false positives in chop or trend pauses.
notes: Cap standalone divergence below A+.

reason_for_priority: Useful operational version of level-based reversal.
required_data: OHLCV; delta; footprint optional; swing/session/user levels
easiest_first_test: Second test within tick tolerance with weaker delta or exhaustion; enter on rejection.
stricter_test: Require fewer than 3 tests, absorption/exhaustion, and next-bar trigger.
soft_score_version: Score clean first level, retest quality, weaker flow, rejection close.
expected_failure_mode: Level selection/tolerance can overfit; many tests weaken level.
notes: Best as enhancer for VH001/VH003/VH007.

reason_for_priority: Low implementation difficulty and protects R quality.
required_data: OHLCV; entry/stop references
easiest_first_test: Penalize signals with bar range above 75th percentile or stop above max ticks.
stricter_test: Reject signals with poor reward room to first reference target.
soft_score_version: Score stop distance, bar range percentile, reward room.
expected_failure_mode: May remove valid high-volatility reversal bars.
notes: Use as cap/risk component from the beginning.

reason_for_priority: Important false-positive control but easy to overfit.
required_data: OHLCV; VWAP; session levels; initial balance; value area optional
easiest_first_test: Downscore countertrend fades during intact trend acceptance; favor range-edge reversals.
stricter_test: Add VWAP slope, IB extension, value acceptance, range location, session phase.
soft_score_version: Score context as cap/weight rather than hard block.
expected_failure_mode: Overfiltering can remove best reversal trades.
notes: Implement after baseline signals so you can quantify filter impact.

reason_for_priority: Core concept but trigger definition is subjective.
required_data: OHLCV; delta; footprint; imbalances optional; levels
easiest_first_test: Strong initiative bar at edge fails to make continuation within 1-3 bars; trade reclaim.
stricter_test: Require trigger-zone reclaim, level quality, and opposite response.
soft_score_version: Score initiative strength, expected follow-through miss, reclaim, context.
expected_failure_mode: Hard to define what 'should continue' means; can become curve-fit.
notes: Use as module inside composite, not first standalone setup.

reason_for_priority: Potentially useful but depends on reliable imbalance engine.
required_data: Footprint bid/ask volume; imbalance ratio; OHLC; levels
easiest_first_test: Buy/sell stack near edge has no follow-through and zone is reclaimed/lost.
stricter_test: Test ratio grid and stack count grid; require level and next-bar failure.
soft_score_version: Score stack strength, no continuation, zone reclaim, level quality.
expected_failure_mode: Fresh trend imbalances are continuation, not reversal.
notes: Do after footprint infrastructure is stable.

reason_for_priority: Interesting absorption subfeature but platform-sensitive.
required_data: Footprint bid/ask; OHLC; levels
easiest_first_test: Imbalance direction conflicts with candle result at level; use as absorption score boost.
stricter_test: Require effort/result failure plus next-bar response.
soft_score_version: Score inverse imbalance, close location, level, response.
expected_failure_mode: Noisy without consistent imbalance calculation.
notes: Confluence only. Do not create standalone signal first.

reason_for_priority: Good discretionary idea, weaker automated label.
required_data: OHLCV; delta; footprint; levels
easiest_first_test: Late aggression at edge with no continuation; price reverses through likely trap zone.
stricter_test: Require absorption/reclaim and avoid labeling protective stop volume as trap.
soft_score_version: Score late aggression, poor location, no continuation, zone reversal.
expected_failure_mode: Trap zone is approximate; can confuse true initiative with trapped flow.
notes: Keep soft. Label as 'aggression failure' in code.

reason_for_priority: Tradable but under-sampled and noisy.
required_data: OHLCV; footprint; volume; delta; swing/session levels
easiest_first_test: Sweep prior high/low with volume spike and reclaim within 1-3 bars.
stricter_test: Require volume percentile, level quality, reclaim, and no continuation.
soft_score_version: Score sweep size, volume spike, reclaim speed, stop compactness.
expected_failure_mode: True breakout/liquidation can continue hard.
notes: Secondary module after failed acceptance works.

reason_for_priority: Easy timing guard, but exact minutes are crude.
required_data: Session clock; OHLCV
easiest_first_test: Downscore/block signals within 5 minutes before cash open.
stricter_test: Test 3/5/10 minute windows and allow post-open re-confirmation.
soft_score_version: Score timing risk instead of hard block in optimization.
expected_failure_mode: May block valid open-transition trades.
notes: Add as metadata early; activate after testing.

reason_for_priority: Evidence supports context, not standalone reversal.
required_data: OHLCV; footprint; delta; levels
easiest_first_test: Large volume at edge plus no continuation and reclaim/rejection.
stricter_test: Require exhaustion/absorption/failed acceptance confluence to exceed B.
soft_score_version: Score volume percentile, no continuation, edge, post-spike reversal.
expected_failure_mode: Large volume can be trend fuel, especially news.
notes: Do not build as primary module in MVP.

reason_for_priority: Potentially useful but risky and not first-pass research.
required_data: OHLCV; footprint; delta; prior signal state
easiest_first_test: After one stop-out, permit one re-entry only if level is reclaimed/rejected again.
stricter_test: Require thesis score still valid and fresh failure confirmation.
soft_score_version: Score re-entry validity, stop-out type, reclaimed edge, unchanged order-flow thesis.
expected_failure_mode: Can encode revenge trading and overfit rare examples.
notes: Defer until base entries and stops are validated.
